title: hieracium dentatum subsp. oblongifrons
intro: Hieracium dentatum subsp. oblongifrons, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium dentatum subsp. oblongifrons are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
